Greve Guillaume 'le Troubadour' d'Aquitaine, IX duc d'Aquitaine et VII comte de Poitou
French: Guillaume d'Aquitaine, le Troubadour
Also Known As:	"le Troubadour", "o Trovador", "The Troubador", "William IX of Aquitaine", "of Poitiers", "de Peitieus", "the Troubador", "VII", "den Unge", "WILHELMSON", "Vilhelm", "William VII of Aquitaine V of /Poitiers/", "Guillaume or Guilhem /d'Aquitaine/", "The /Troubador/", "the Troubadou..."
Birthdate:	October 22, 1071
Birthplace:	Bordeaux, Aquitania, France
Death:	February 10, 1126 (54)
Poitiers, Poitou-Charentes, France
Place of Burial:	Montierneuf, France
Immediate Family:	
Son of Guillaume VIII Geoffroy d'Aquitaine, VIII duc d'Aquitaine et Vl comte de Poitou and Hildegarde of Burgundy
Husband of Philippa de Toulouse, comtesse de Poitiers; Ermengarde d'Anjou, Duchess of Aquitaine Fergant; Hildegarde of Marets and Berthe

Wikipedia
Born	22 October 1071
Died	10 February 1127 (aged 55)
Noble family	Poitiers
Spouse(s)	Ermengarde of Anjou
Philippa of Toulouse
Issue	William X, Duke of Aquitaine
Raymond, Prince of Antioch
Agnes, Queen of Aragon
Father	William VIII of Aquitaine
Mother	Hildegarde of Burgundy

William IX (Occitan: Guilhèm de Peitieus; Guilhem de Poitou French: Guillaume de Poitiers) (22 October 1071 – 10 February 1127), called the Troubadour, was the Duke of Aquitaine and Gascony and Count of Poitou (as William VII) between 1086 and his death. He was also one of the leaders of the Crusade of 1101. 

Though his political and military achievements have a certain historical importance, he is best known as the earliest troubadour[1]—a vernacular lyric poet in the Occitan language—whose work survives.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Guillaume IX Duc d'Aquitaine於1071年10月22日出生在羅曼 艾皮爾高盧加利亞 阿奎塔尼亞時，他的父親Guy 'William' d'Aquitaine VIII47歲，母親Hildegarde de Bourgogne duchesse d'Aquitaine15歲。他於1089年與Ermengarde d'Anjou在法國加斯可結婚。他於1101年登記服兵役。他去世於1127年2月10日在法國努維勒-阿吉泰維安波爾斯享年55歲，埋葬在法國努維勒-阿吉泰維安波爾斯。

variants.name: William
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When Guillaume IX Duc d'Aquitaine was born on 22 October 1071, in Gallia Aquitania, Gaul, Roman Empire, his father, Guy 'William' d'Aquitaine VIII, was 47 and his mother, Hildegarde de Bourgogne duchesse d'Aquitaine, was 15. He married Ermengarde d'Anjou in 1089, in Gascogne, France. He registered for military service in 1101. He died on 10 February 1127, in Poitiers, Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France, at the age of 55, and was buried in Poitiers, Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Guillaume IX Duc d'Aquitaine est né le 22 octobre 1071, à Gallia Aquitania, Gaul, Roman Empire, son père, Guy 'William' d'Aquitaine VIII, avait 47 ans et sa mère, Hildegarde de Bourgogne duchesse d'Aquitaine, avait 15 ans. Il a épousé Ermengarde d'Anjou en 1089, à Gascogne, France. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1101. Il est décédé le 10 février 1127, à Poitiers, Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France, à l’âge de 55 ans, et a été enterré à Poitiers, Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Guillaume IX Duc d'Aquitaine am 22. Oktober 1071 in Gallia Aquitania, Gaul, Roman Empire geboren wurde, war sein Vater Guy 'William' d'Aquitaine VIII 47 und seine Mutter Hildegarde de Bourgogne duchesse d'Aquitaine 15. Er hat 1089 in Gascogne, Frankreich Ermengarde d'Anjou geheiratet. Er hat sich 1101 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 10. Februar 1127 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Poitiers, Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Frankreich und wurde in Poitiers, Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Guillaume IX Duc d'Aquitaine è nato il il 22 ottobre 1071 nel Gallia Aquitania, Gaul, Roman Empire, il suo padre, Guy 'William' d'Aquitaine VIII, aveva 47 anni e il suo madre, Hildegarde de Bourgogne duchesse d'Aquitaine, aveva 15 anni. Lui sposato Ermengarde d'Anjou nel 1089, nel Gascogne, Francia. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1101. Morì il 10 febbraio 1127, nel Poitiers, Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia, all'età di 55 anni, e fu sepolto a Poitiers, Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Guillaume IX Duc d'Aquitaineが1071年10月22日にロマン エンパアーガウルガリア アクイタニアで生まれた時，父Guy 'William' d'Aquitaine VIIIは47歳，母Hildegarde de Bourgogne duchesse d'Aquitaineは15歳であった。1089年にフランスガスコグンでErmengarde d'Anjouと結婚した。彼は1101年に兵役登録をした。彼は1127年2月10日にフランスノウベレ-アクイティアインヴィエンポイティエルズで55歳で死去し，フランスノウベレ-アクイティアインヴィエンポイティエルズにて埋葬された。

ko.Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Maine-et-Loire, Pa: 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 맹-트-로이르 폰테브라트-'압베이
ko.lifeSummary: Guillaume IX Duc d'Aquitaine(이)가 1071년 10월 22일 로먼 피르 가 갈리야 아키탠이아에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Guy 'William' d'Aquitaine VIII(은)는 47세였고, 그의 어머니 Hildegarde de Bourgogne duchesse d'Aquitaine(은)는 15세였다. 그는 1089년 프랑스 가스코그니에서 Ermengarde d'Anjou(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1101년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1127년 2월 10일 프랑스 노우벨레-아키테인 비니 포이티어스에서 55세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 노우벨레-아키테인 비니 포이티어스에 묻혔다.

pt.22 October 1071–10 February 1127: 22 de outubro de 1071–10 de fevereiro de 1127
pt.Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Maine-et-Loire, Pa: Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, França
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Guillaume IX Duc d'Aquitaine nasceu em 22 de outubro de 1071, em Gallia Aquitania, Gaul, Roman Empire, seu pai, Guy 'William' d'Aquitaine VIII, tinha 47 anos e sua mãe, Hildegarde de Bourgogne duchesse d'Aquitaine, tinha 15 anos. Ele casou-se com Ermengarde d'Anjou em 1089, em Gascogne, França. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1101. Ele faleceu em 10 de fevereiro de 1127, em Poitiers, Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, França, com 55 anos, e foi sepultado em Poitiers, Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, França.

ro.Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Maine-et-Loire, Pa: Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Franţa

ru.Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Maine-et-Loire, Pa: фонтевраулт-л'аббеи, меине-ет-лоир, пеис де ла лоир, Франция
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Guillaume IX Duc d'Aquitaine родился 22 октября 1071 г. в местности галла аквитаня, гаул, роман эмпир, его отцу по имени Guy 'William' d'Aquitaine VIII было 47 лет, а матери, которую звали Hildegarde de Bourgogne duchesse d'Aquitaine, 15. Он женился на женщине по имени Ermengarde d'Anjou в 1089 г. в местности гаскогн, Франция. В 1101 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 10 февраля 1127 г. в местности поитиирс, виенн, ноувелле-аквитеин, Франция в возрасте 55 лет и был похоронен в местности поитиирс, виенн, ноувелле-аквитеин, Франция.

es.22 October 1071–10 February 1127: 22 de octubre de 1071–10 de febrero de 1127
es.Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Maine-et-Loire, Pa: Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Francia
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Guillaume IX Duc d'Aquitaine nació el 22 de octubre de 1071, en Gallia Aquitania, Gaul, Roman Empire, su papá, Guy 'William' d'Aquitaine VIII, tenía 47 años y su mamá, Hildegarde de Bourgogne duchesse d'Aquitaine, tenía 15 años. Se casó con Ermengarde d'Anjou en 1089, en Gascogne, Francia. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1101. Murió el 10 de febrero de 1127, en Poitiers, Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia, a la edad de 55 años, y fue sepultado en Poitiers, Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia.
